title: valeriana longiflora subsp. paui
intro: Valeriana longiflora subsp. paui is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae, native to the Mediterranean region, and is commonly known as Paui's Valerian or Spanish Valerian. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, sedative, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Valeriana longiflora subsp. paui include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as pain relief and improved sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
